g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the ACLED conflict data source')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the CHIRPS rainfall data source')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about FEWS NET IPC food security data')
sendPrompt('How is the data merged across sources?')
sendPrompt('What does the raw dataset look like?')
sendPrompt('What are the 32 features used in the model?')
sendPrompt('What does the training set look like?')
sendPrompt('What is the validation set used for?')
sendPrompt('Why is the test set sealed?')
sendPrompt('Why was tuned XGBoost selected as the final model?')
sendPrompt('What do the test set evaluation metrics mean?')
sendPrompt('What does the SHAP analysis show?')
sendPrompt('How does the Streamlit deployment app work?')
